_comment: Dylan's rotating 12-hour shift schedule at the glass container plant.
1. PATTERN MODE  -- if your rotation follows a fixed repeating pattern
fill in 'pattern' as the sequence of shift letters for one cycle:
Plus 'anchor_date' = a date you KNOW the first letter of the
pattern applies to. Penelope rolls forward from there.
2. CALENDAR MODE -- if your rotation is irregular, list explicit
dates. Set 'mode' = 'calendar' and fill in 'days' as an array of
{date, shift} entries. Shift letters as above.
Dylan can send Penelope a photo of his printed schedule and she'll
fill this file in for him (vision read on the photo).
Times default to 6am-6pm for day, 6pm-6am for night. Override per-day
_routine_comment: Dylan wakes at 05:00 for day shifts / 17:00 for nights, leaves the house 05:15-05:30 AM/PM depending on direction. Penelope uses these for pre-shift greetings + wake-up nudges.
_pattern_comment: Crew D's 28-day O-I Kalama rotation, viewed as 4 weeks:
Anchored to 2026-01-02 (the first day of cycle 1 in the printed
and reads the letter at that index of 'sequence'.
14 work days per 28-day cycle (7 day shifts, 7 night shifts).
_days_comment: Calendar mode override list. Empty when using pattern mode. If a date appears here it wins over the pattern (good for one-off swaps).
